chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.No.D-1035 of 2022 Date Order with signature of Judge ________________________________________________________ 1. For order on office objection 2. For hearing of CMA No. 4676/2022 3. For hearing of main case 06.08.2025 Mr. Ali Asadullah Bullo advocate for the petitioner Mr. Aizaz advocate for respondent Mr. Dur Muhammad DAG -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Learned counsel for the petitioner states that he would be satisfied if an order is passed directing the KPT Board of Trustees and its Chairman (respondents No.2 and 3) to consider the petitioner’s case for the post of Deputy Chief Medical Officer (BS-19). Learned counsel for KPT has no objection to such proposition. Order accordingly. The respondents are directed to consider the petitioner's case for the said post through a speaking order within three months from the date of this order. Copy of this order shall be sent to Chairman KPT for information and compliance. Petition stands disposed of in the above terms along with all listed/pending applications. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Wasim PS
